examples: The system will archive the information so agencies can review it in detail.
A quarter of this vast archive has been indexed and made accessible to researchers.
One additional service not discussed so far is the ability to archive and prune old instances that may no longer be required.
Mathews keeps an archive of press coverage from the daily El Heraldo de Chihuahua.
Various genealogical societies also organise trips to archive centres, where census, birth, marriage and death records are stored.
